title: Settlebrook
description: AI-powered legal content platform monetized via Google AdSense. Built on Next.js App Router with programmatic SEO architecture and hybrid ad strategy.
challenge: A legal content site needed to scale monetization through AdSense while maintaining authority in a YMYL niche. The dual challenge was generating EEAT-compliant legal content at scale while optimizing ad layouts for maximum revenue — two goals that typically conflict. Required sub-second load times, responsive ad placements that don't trigger CLS, and a scalable content architecture.
solution: Built on Next.js 15 App Router with static generation + ISR, delivering sub-second LCP that maximizes AdSense viewability scores. Implemented a hybrid ad strategy combining manual high-CTR placements with Google Auto Ads, achieving 18% RPM lift. Technical SEO included structured data, auto-generated sitemaps, responsive ad units with CSS min-height CLS protection, and performance budgets under 500KB per page.
result: Sub-second legal content platform with 90+ Lighthouse scores and 18% RPM improvement through hybrid ad strategy

title: One With Prana
description: Comprehensive SEO overhaul for a Fort Collins-based regression therapy practice. Fixed technical issues, restructured content, and built local visibility.
challenge: A regression therapy practice with excellent on-page content had zero analytics tracking, no backlink profile, and weak local visibility. The Squarespace site had 20+ unorganized articles with 21 duplicate H1 tags, missing FAQ schema, and no clear content hierarchy. Without analytics, every optimization was a shot in the dark.
solution: Conducted a full technical and content audit. Restructured 20+ articles into pillar-cluster architecture, fixed heading hierarchy (21 H1s → 1 H1), implemented FAQPage schema, and installed Google Analytics 4. Developed a local SEO strategy targeting 'regression therapy Fort Collins' and 'somatic trauma healing Colorado' with optimized Google Business Profile and therapy directory listings.
result: Complete SEO foundation with pillar-cluster architecture, proper schema markup, and local visibility strategy in place

title: KeepHashing
description: Technical SEO audit and cleanup for a UAE-based ASIC mining hardware supplier. Fixed critical 404s, redirect chains, and built backlink strategy.
challenge: A UAE-based ASIC mining hardware supplier on WordPress had solid on-page fundamentals but suffered from critical technical issues: 4 broken links (including a 404 in the footer and a broken blog URL), 3 redirect chains instead of direct paths, duplicate content from a secondary Wix domain, and a dangerously thin backlink profile. The site was invisible for high-intent commercial queries like 'buy ASIC miner Dubai'.
solution: Executed a full technical crawl identifying all broken paths. Fixed all 404 links, resolved 301 redirect chains to direct paths, implemented rel=canonical across domain variants, and built a backlink strategy targeting crypto mining publications (CoinDesk, CryptoSlate), ASIC review sites (asicminervalue.com), and UAE business directories. Created pillar content targeting high-CPC commercial queries.
result: Clean technical foundation with no crawl errors, proper canonicalization, and active backlink acquisition pipeline

title: Dexign House
description: On-page SEO overhaul and content strategy for a Lahore-based architecture and interior design studio. Fixed headings, meta tags, and built content pipeline.
challenge: A Lahore-based architecture firm on WordPress/Elementor had solid technical SEO but weak on-page optimization. The homepage H1 was a creative tagline ('Designing Dreams') instead of a keyword-optimized headline. 28 H2s diluted semantic structure, 39% of images lacked alt text, and there were no Open Graph or Twitter Card meta tags. The site had zero blog content and virtually no backlinks.
solution: Optimized the homepage heading structure for keyword relevance — changed H1 to match service-based keywords, consolidated from 28 to 8 H2s. Added alt text to all images, implemented OG and Twitter Card tags. Built a content marketing strategy with service-specific landing pages for architecture and interior design keywords. Created backlink plan targeting Houzz, ArchDaily, and Architizer profiles.
result: Clean on-page SEO with keyword-optimized headings, complete meta coverage, and a content-first growth strategy in place

title: Dr. Bec
description: Custom nervous system quiz funnel on GoHighLevel/Ivorey with 4 result paths, postMessage redirect system, and 4 automated email workflows.
challenge: A nervous system specialist needed a zero-touch patient qualification funnel that could assess nervous system dysregulation through a quiz, deliver one of 4 personalized result pages, and automatically enroll patients into the right email nurture sequence — all without manual screening calls or complex CRM setup.
solution: Designed a multi-step quiz on GoHighLevel/Ivorey that asks targeted questions about nervous system symptoms. Built 4 distinct result paths using custom JavaScript postMessage redirects for seamless quiz-to-result transitions. Each result triggers a tailored 4-email automation sequence matching the patient's specific nervous system profile — automated, scalable, zero manual work.
result: Fully automated patient intake pipeline with personalized email nurture, running 24/7 on GoHighLevel

title: Citrus House Craft
description: Custom Shopify storefront with custom Liquid sections, hero overlays, and Dawn theme customization for a premium dehydrated citrus garnishes brand.
challenge: A premium dehydrated citrus garnishes brand launching on Shopify needed a storefront that communicated product quality and versatility, not just another commodity food page. The Dawn theme's default layout lacked the visual storytelling needed to justify premium pricing and convey the product's range of uses across cocktails, baking, and charcuterie.
solution: Built custom Liquid sections for the Dawn theme including a hero overlay with product-in-context imagery, a multi-column feature grid highlighting use cases, and a brand story section. All custom-coded without breaking Shopify's theme update compatibility. Maintained performance while adding visual richness through optimized SVGs and lazy-loaded imagery.
result: Premium Shopify storefront with custom-coded Liquid sections that tell a brand story while maintaining theme compatibility
